questions.prompt: Welke Their They Their They Their They

explanations.overview: <strong> signals strong importance and is semantically meaningful.

byOptionId.strong: Correct â€” <strong> conveys strong importance semantically.
byOptionId.em: Incorrect â€” <em> indicates emphasis but not the same semantic weight as <strong>.
byOptionId.b: Incorrect â€” <b> is purely presentational; <strong> adds semantic meaning.
byOptionId.i: Incorrect â€” <i> is presentational and does not imply importance.
